violations.text: The oven exhaust is in poor repair, with parts of the surface layer peeling and missing in areas. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (food containers on the clean storage rack) were observed with an accumulation of food, debris, and adhesive residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Items were taken to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2025

Meatballs, which were previously cooked and cooled, was only reheated to 147 degrees Fahrenheit for hot holding. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food that is cooked, cooled, and reheated for hot holding must be reheated to 165 degrees Fahrenheit or above for 15 seconds. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2025

Hamburgers and deli meat in the salad prep unit observed held at 44-46 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Items were placed in freezer to rapidly chill, and unit adjusted colder. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2025
Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the dough prep area. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: soap dispenser near grill area beneath grill sani bucket portion cup storage bin sandwich bag storage bin bun bins beneath grill freezer prep units especially lid at salad prep station cupboards in front service area kitchen trash cans plastic soda crates used as dunnage racks in dry storage area rolling rack walk in shelves including the undersides semolina flour bin. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The push bar on the outside door in the kitchen has an accumulation of soil residue.The wall next to the oven has an accumulation of dust clumps.The ceiling and fan covers in the walk in cooler have an accumulation of dust and mold.The kitchen ceiling especially around vents has an accumulation of debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/17/2025

The pipe insulation in the dry storage area is in poor repair, cracked & torn, exposing spun insulation. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/17/2025
The pizza prep unit was not in good repair. Unit has been taken out of use until it can be serviced. PIC stated service is scheduled for later today. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -under prep unit hoods -doors to reach-in freezer on grill line -under grill. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2024
The refuse area was observed with litter and grease build-up around the grease receptacle. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2024

Tuna salad was observed held at 44-46 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Tuna salad was brought to walk-in to rapidly chill. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2024

Prep unit at the grill station was observed with an ambient temperature of 50-55 degrees. PIC adjusted thermostat during inspection. Any foods not within proper temperature were placed in other refrigeration units. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2024

Working containers of various spices and oils are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2024
Cleaned and sanitized equipment and utensils are not stored inverted. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2024
The pizza prep unit was not in good repair, observed with a bent lid at the hinge.. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -gaskets on several units -under prep unit hoods -doors to reach-in freezer on grill line -walk-in fan guards -under grill. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2024
The refuse area was observed with litter and grease build up around the grease receptacle. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2024
Gaskets for 2 door standup freezer was observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/19/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the speed rack and dunnage racks in the walk-in cooler have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2023

Refuse area was observed with trash and litter on ground and grease buildup by oil disposal unit. An area for refuse, returnables or recycables must be maintained clean and free of litter. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2023
